# Awesome GPT Image 2

Browse 100 GPT Image 2 prompt examples with generated images, reusable tags, image-generation use cases, and prompt text for product mockups, UI, games, diagrams, and storytelling.

Primary URL: https://gptimg2.best/
Repository: https://github.com/pyth0nb3st/awesome-gpt-image-2
Creator tools: https://drillso.com/ and https://vibeart.app/
Gallery JSON: https://gptimg2.best/gallery.json
Sitemap: https://gptimg2.best/sitemap.xml

The site contains 100 generated image examples. Each example includes a repository-local image, full prompt text, dimensions, creation time, and semantic tags for prompt discovery.
Dedicated prompt pages: 100
Dedicated tag pages: 24

Top tags:
- typography: 65
- product-mockup: 63
- game-design: 56
- ui-mockup: 51
- storytelling: 48
- lighting-weather: 36
- photoreal: 32
- worldbuilding: 32
- infographic: 28
- interior-design: 21
- education: 20
- material-study: 16
- operations: 15
- evaluation: 13
- productivity-visual: 13
- stylized-concept: 12
- illustration-story: 8
- ads-marketing: 7
